summary: Project featuring a hero section with an AI illustration of Odisha's state map with solar power theme.
imageRequirements:
## Edit Images
- Replace the hero background with an AI illustration of the Odisha state map silhouette filled with solar panel patterns, glowing sun rays radiating outward, and energy grid lines overlaid on the map, using warm amber, orange, and gold tones against a deep navy sky background (hero-odisha-solar.dim_1920x1080.png > hero-odisha-solar-map.dim_1920x1080.png)

existing_features.title: Generate a new AI illustration hero image depicting the state map of Odisha overlaid with solar power elements (solar panels, sun rays, energy grid lines, warm amber/orange glow), suitable for use as a full-screen hero background. Save as 'hero-odisha-solar-map.dim_1920x1080.png' in frontend/public/assets/generated.

Update the Hero component (frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx) to replace the existing hero background illustration with the newly generated Odisha solar map image ('hero-odisha-solar-map.dim_1920x1080.png'). Ensure the image is displayed as a full-screen background with appropriate overlay to keep headline and CTA text readable.
